reference: I am having pains in my lower abdomen. It hurts to breathe and cough, but it is not menstrual pains as I am no longer on my period. Also, I release urine quite a bit throughout the day, but even if I have just been, I feel like it is leaking into my underwear and I end up with a wet patch in my underwear. Is there anything you think this could be?
text: I am having pains in my lower abdomen. It hurts to breathe and cough, but it is not menstrual pain. But I am no longer hungry. Also, I really feel uncomfortable out there. But even if I have the pain, I feel as if I need to change my underwear and let the wetness remember it. The only thing I think it could be.
